Bargynn's Torch  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +2 INT: +2
SV FIRE: +2
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Bargynn's Torch
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +2 INT: +2
SV FIRE: +2
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Light:Tiny Glowing Skull
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:12 pp 7 gp 5 sp 8 cp
Tribute:55
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-14 04:04:51
Page Updated:Sat Mar 29th, 2025

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kurn's Tower
NPC Name
Bargynn

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Quest Name
Oasis of Swamps (Tides of TIme) (10 Points)
Oasis of the Jungle (Tides of Time) (10 Points)

Oasis of Fire (Tides of Time) (10 Points)

Quest Item
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 5:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779345130
Scholar
25 posts
Seems as though most people are missing the point of this item altogether. This item is part of the quest for the Scaled Mystic Helm, +10 AC +5 WIS +5 MANA +2 SV COLD, Iksar Shaman only. Very nice helm for the mid level iksar shaman. It looks like that funny horned skull when worn.
▲ Page top
RE: Quest Item
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2002 at 5:12 AM Rating: Decent
Morigu
Sage
239 posts
I believe the Scaled Mystic Helm is made using Bargynn's Digger, the weapon he drops not the torch. At least that's what the quest list on this site says:
https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=792

Morigu

Voidslayer Jhereg, Destroyer of Worlds, Monk, <Celestial Navigators>, Drinal server
Vanidor Silverbranch, Wizard, <Celestial Navigators>, Drinal server

Went and got one of these last nite. Yes, it IS a lightsource, like a Lightstone. Looking to give it away now since I'm not dumping Spirit Tome or Stein for it...

Is it a lightsource? Just curious for confirmation because Verant and the obvious assumption do NOT always go hand in hand...

#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 05 2001 at 3:04 AM, Rating: Unrated, (Expand Post) I cleared the room several times today were is supposed to pop. After about 2 hours he poped up. He immedaitly charged at me and began o suck my ****! It felt good!! O yeah and then i kicked his **** *** and got the torch thing. WOOOOOOOOOOTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT!

# May 21 2001 at 11:13 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
he spawns when the back area of the basement is cleared

RE: spawn time
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 7:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253014569
19 posts
I was camping Jester and my friend tells me there is a named burnai down there who drops some items (he didnt know what). I go down there and the area is NOT cleared and he is sitting there. Wasted him with my 27 warrior. Just letting you know that the basement doen not have to be cleared.
▲ Page top
it looks like a torch
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 6:29 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
well it's name is Bargynn's Torch and it looks like a torch wherever you put it, dunno where you peeps get such funny ideas, but a torch usually looks like a torch


▲ Page top
Opalium
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 2:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
killed him last night,
with a mage 18 and a necro 20, way too easy, he was yellow at lv 18.
He drop both the torch and the digger.
(My pet was so happy to use the digger :P)

nice tips, you can give a NO DROP item to your pet.

277 posts
just for any readers information: gone are such times. so don't try it.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 24 2001 at 6:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what are you guys talking about....this item totally sucks...was a waste of my time
Torch
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2001 at 6:00 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
bargynn is a little tough. he has a 4 hour spawn... i think. he, him self is the easy on. i nuked him over and over as pet beat on him at lvl 26. although i couldnt get to him without some help. brought a friend with me,lvl 39 at the time i think. all i needed was his pet to take some stuff. other then that he fell easy. torch is nice and looks cool when you put it in primary and have another torch in secondary. when your down in the cats of kurns tower. the buryanis is what you need to watch for. as they enjoy multiple harm touches. i had no trouble with the skeles as i just rooted them and let my pet solo one at a time as i healed it. but yes, getting to him was hard.
▲ Page top
RE: Torch
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2001 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hard? I was able to take him with the help of a monk. Both of us are twenty and took him 2x times. I am not sure where the 4 hr spawn comes from. He spawned for us 2 times in less then an hour.
